About BhummiVastu

Meet Vastu Acharya Minu Saini

Certified Vastu and Vedic Astrology consultant serving clients across India. Helping individuals, families, and businesses create lasting harmony, clarity, and prosperity through the ancient sciences of Vastu Shastra and Jyotish — with a modern, practical, non-demolition approach.

Trust Built Through Results

100+
Satisfied Clients
5+
Years of Practice
6
Services Offered
Pan India
Cities Served

Our Story

The BhummiVastu Story

BhummiVastu was born from a deep conviction: that the ancient sciences of Vastu Shastra and Vedic Astrology, when applied with integrity and scientific rigour, have the power to transform not just spaces — but lives.

Rooted in Tradition

Minu Saini's journey into Vastu and Astrology began with years of dedicated study under traditional Vedic masters, absorbing classical texts and practical frameworks that have guided Indian civilisation for millennia.

Shaped by Modern Practice

With 5+ years of active consulting across India — online for clients nationwide and in-person across Bangalore and Karnataka — Minu ji has refined her approach through hundreds of real client cases.

Non-Demolition First

Every consultation at BhummiVastu begins with a simple commitment: no structural changes, no demolition, no unnecessary expense. Harmony is achieved through colour, direction, elemental placement, and intelligent spatial corrections.

Rooted in Bangalore, Serving India

Based at Pruksa Silvana, Budigere Cross, Bangalore East. All consultations are available online (Zoom / Google Meet) for clients anywhere in India. In-person sessions are available for clients in Bangalore and Karnataka.

Science, Not Superstition

Vastu is a science of spatial geometry and elemental energy — not religion or superstition. Every recommendation is explained with directional logic and scientific reasoning so clients are empowered, not dependent.

Ethical Always

BhummiVastu does not use fear, urgency, or exaggerated claims. Every engagement is built on honesty, transparency, and genuine care for the client's well-being and long-term growth.

The Approach

How Minu Saini Works

A transparent, structured approach built on deep analysis, honest communication, and lasting results.

  • 1

    Deep Listening First

    Every engagement begins with understanding your specific challenges — health, career, relationships, finances. Solutions are personalised to your life, not copied from a template.

  • 2

    Precision Analysis

    Using a 16-zone Vastu framework, 45 energy fields, and detailed birth chart analysis (for Astrology and Astro-Vastu), every consultation is forensically thorough.

  • 3

    Clear Communication

    Reports are written in plain language. Every recommendation is explained — why it works, how to implement it, and what outcome to expect. No jargon. No dependency.

  • 4

    Follow-Up Accountability

    A complimentary follow-up review 4–6 weeks after implementation ensures corrections are working and results are tracking as expected.

Recognition

Credentials & Achievements

Built through years of dedicated study and hundreds of successful client consultations.

View Certifications

  • Certified Vastu Acharya

    Formally certified through rigorous training in traditional Vastu Shastra principles, directional science, and Vedic spatial analysis.

  • 100+ Satisfied Clients

    Clients served across India — residential homes, commercial offices, startups, industrial units, and Astro-Vastu integrations, from metros to smaller cities.

  • Advanced Vedic & Spiritual Training

    Continuous learning in traditional Vedic disciplines, Jyotish (Vedic Astrology), and spiritual sciences — ensuring consultations remain deeply grounded in authentic tradition.

Our Base

Where to Find Us

Registered Office

Pruksa Silvana, Budigere Cross, Off Old Madras Road, Bangalore East Tq. — 560049

Online Consultations

Serving clients across India via detailed floor plan review, Google Earth mapping, and video call. Distance is no barrier to a personalised consultation.

Phone & WhatsApp

+91-99727 09328 — Call or WhatsApp to discuss your requirements and book a consultation.

Email

minusaini@bhummivastu.com — Reach us for enquiries, floor plan submissions, or detailed questions.

Ready to Begin Your Journey?

Book a consultation with Vastu Acharya Minu Saini and take the first step toward a life of harmony, clarity, and prosperity.
